commands.command: vp gen vite:monorepo --no-interactive # create monorepo with default values

commands: ls vite-plus-monorepo | LC_ALL=C sort # check files created
test -d vite-plus-monorepo/.git && echo 'Git initialized' || echo 'No git' # check git init
ls vite-plus-monorepo/apps # check apps directory created

commands.command: cd vite-plus-monorepo && vp gen --no-interactive vite:application # create application in non-interactive mode

commands: ls vite-plus-monorepo/apps # check apps directory created

commands.command: cd vite-plus-monorepo && vp gen --no-interactive vite:library # create library in non-interactive mode
cd vite-plus-monorepo && vp gen --no-interactive vite:generator # create generator in non-interactive mode

commands: ls vite-plus-monorepo/tools # check tools directory created

commands.command: vp gen vite:monorepo --no-interactive --directory my-vite-plus-monorepo # create monorepo with custom directory

commands: ls my-vite-plus-monorepo | LC_ALL=C sort # check files created
